overall.description: First-person gameplay footage from Cyberpunk 2077 showing a walk through a derelict urban waterfront area. The player emerges from a dark underpass into a sunlit plaza, continues along a palm-lined waterfront promenade past a group of NPCs, and proceeds down a city sidewalk between colorful apartment buildings.

agents.ego_description: walking through the dark underpass toward a concrete stairway

entered.detail: massive concrete highway overpass creating a covered tunnel effect
industrial waste container with yellow lid showing signs of fire damage
concrete wall covered in blue and white spray paint tags
tall grass and weeds growing through cracks in the pavement
wide concrete staircase leading upward out of the underpass

segments.scene_description: The segment opens in a dark, enclosed underpass beneath a massive concrete highway structure. Overgrown vegetation and a yellow dumpster occupy the sides, while graffiti covers the walls. The camera moves forward toward a concrete stairway leading upward.

events.description: emerging from dark underpass into bright midday sunlight

agents.ego_description: climbing the concrete stairs out of the underpass into daylight

entered.detail: multi-story concrete parking structure with orange and teal accents
tall palm trees visible against the bright sky
clear blue sky becoming visible as the stairs ascend

segments.scene_description: The camera ascends the concrete stairs, transitioning from the dark underpass into bright sunlight. A parking garage building and palm trees become visible on the right as the sky opens up above.

scene_state.functional_zone: abandoned urban plaza with derelict vehicle

events.description: exiting stairway into open sunlit plaza with abandoned vehicles and large commercial buildings

agents.ego_description: exploring the open plaza, walking past an abandoned car toward the large building with signage

notable_agents.action: distant figures standing near the entrance of the Second Amendment building

entered.detail: derelict green sedan with missing doors and hood, overgrown with weeds
large commercial building with giant skeleton mural and red neon signage reading 2ND AMENDMENT
modern orange-topped street lamps lining the plaza

segments.scene_description: Emerging into a bright sunlit plaza, the scene reveals an abandoned green car and the massive Second Amendment building with its distinctive skeleton mural. The camera moves past the derelict vehicle toward the building while distant NPCs stand near the entrance.

scene_state.functional_zone: waterfront promenade with palm trees overlooking ocean

events.description: turning onto waterfront promenade with view of ocean, distant ferris wheel, and pyramid-shaped building

agents.ego_description: walking along the waterfront promenade with palm trees on both sides

entered.detail: calm blue ocean visible beyond the promenade railing
large amusement park ferris wheel on the distant shoreline
distinctive pyramid-shaped modern building in the distance
wide concrete walkway littered with debris and overgrown plants

segments.scene_description: The scene transitions to a waterfront promenade lined with palm trees. The ocean stretches out to the right while a distant ferris wheel and pyramid-shaped building are visible on the left. The camera walks along the debris-strewn concrete path.

scene_state.functional_zone: outdoor seating area with digital advertising display

agents.ego_description: approaching and passing a group of people gathered around an outdoor table with a digital screen

notable_agents.action: group of four people sitting around a folding table with one person standing and raising arms in celebration
person standing with crossed arms near the digital screen

entered.detail: folding table and chairs set up on the promenade with drinks and items on top
standalone digital billboard displaying animated advertisements

segments.scene_description: The camera approaches a group of NPCs gathered around a folding table on the promenade. A digital advertising screen stands nearby while one person celebrates with raised arms. The group sits in casual poses as the camera passes by them.

scene_state.functional_zone: city sidewalk between colorful apartment buildings

events.description: turning inland from waterfront onto city street between residential buildings

agents.ego_description: walking down the city sidewalk between the colorful apartment building and parking garage

entered.detail: residential building with distinctive orange and pink balcony accents
narrow urban sidewalk with scattered debris and newspaper
empty asphalt street running parallel to the sidewalk

segments.scene_description: Turning away from the waterfront, the camera proceeds down a city sidewalk flanked by a colorful apartment building on the left and the parking garage on the right. Palm trees line the center of the walkway as the scene continues down the urban street.

merged_segments.scene_description: The shot follows a continuous camera movement from a dark, enclosed underpass into a bright, sun-drenched urban waterfront and city street. It begins beneath a massive concrete highway structure amidst graffiti and overgrown vegetation, moving forward and ascending a stairway that transitions the lighting from deep shadow into brilliant sunlight. As the camera emerges into a wide plaza, the view opens up to reveal an abandoned green car and the skeleton mural of the Second Amendment building before shifting toward a palm-lined promenade overlooking the ocean. The scene then glides past a group of NPCs gathered around a folding table and a digital advertising screen, with a distant ferris wheel and pyramid building visible on the horizon. Finally, the camera turns away from the water to proceed down a city sidewalk flanked by colorful apartment buildings and a parking garage.
